FilePublisherRule.Name: (Default Rule) All signed packaged apps
FilePublisherRule.Description: Allows members of the Everyone group to run packaged apps that are signed.

FilePublisherCondition.PublisherName: O=RAZER USA LTD., L=IRVINE, S=CALIFORNIA, C=US

FilePathRule.Name: [TOGGLE TEMPORARY] Allow Everything in AppData Local
FilePathRule.Description: --- Always remember to change it back to Deny after finishing. --- An exception is added for signed files so that even when this is set to Deny, it will not override the rule to allow signed files.

FilePathRule.Name: (Default Rule) Microsoft Windows DLLs
FilePathRule.Description: Allows members of the Everyone group to load DLLs located in the Windows folder.

FilePublisherRule.Name: Block Powershell ISE Outside Original Paths
Block Process Hacker Publisher
FilePublisherRule.Description: Legitimate software but sometimes used and abused by malware.

FilePublisherCondition.PublisherName: O=WEN JIA LIU, L=SYDNEY, S=NEW SOUTH WALES, C=AU
O=ADOBE INC., L=SAN JOSE, S=CA, C=US

FilePathRule.Name: [TOGGLE TEMPORARY] Allow Everything in AppData Local
FilePathRule.Description:
--- Always remember to change it back to Deny after finishing. ---
An exception is added for signed files so that even when this is set to Deny, it will not override the rule to allow signed files.

FileHashRule.Name: Block NirCMD
FileHashRule.Description: Legitimate software but used and abused by some malware. Various Versions Included

FilePublisherCondition.PublisherName: O=RAZER USA LTD., L=IRVINE, S=CALIFORNIA, C=US

FilePublisherRule.Name: All digitally signed Windows Installer files
FilePublisherRule.Description: Allows members of the Everyone group to run digitally signed Windows Installer files.

FilePathRule.Name: [TOGGLE TEMPORARY] Allow Everything in AppData Local
FilePathRule.Description:
--- Always remember to change it back to Deny after finishing. ---
An exception is added for signed files so that even when this is set to Deny, it will not override the rule to allow signed files.
